approved_by: human governance decision approving E6 bootstrap execution and resolving D1 in favor of i18next + react-i18next + expo-localization

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

modified_files: apps/mobile/package.json — added i18next, react-i18next, expo-localization, @supabase/supabase-js, and react-native-url-polyfill dependencies.
apps/mobile/app/_layout.tsx — imported i18n, replaced mock NavigationGuard with Supabase-backed auth + profile completion redirect.
apps/mobile/app/(customer)/_layout.tsx — registered services and profile routes.
apps/mobile/app/(shared)/settings.tsx — uses useAuth from feature and i18n translations.
packages/types/src/dto/index.ts — added optional phone field to ProfileDto.
.gitignore — added .turbo/ directory to ignore local Turbo cache artifacts.
pnpm-lock.yaml — updated by pnpm install after dependency changes.
mutations.note: node_modules/ and .turbo/ directories are install/build artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: i18next + react-i18next + expo-localization; initial locale es-MX; namespace-based JSON resources under src/locales/.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved governance decision resolving D1; matches I18N-001 t('key') contract and future English/Portuguese expansion.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Supabase Auth via @supabase/supabase-js with Expo SecureStore-backed session persistence.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: AUTH-001 delegates identity to Supabase Auth; SecureStore matches E5 session persistence contract.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: src/features/{auth,profile,marketplace,technician} with screens, services, hooks, and tests; app/ contains only route re-exports.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved E5 architectural recommendation; keeps Expo Router as a routing layer.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: In-memory fake services (FakeServiceCatalogService) and fake profile service (FakeProfileService) seeded from E4 domain DTOs.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E6 delivers the discovery vertical slice without requiring a live backend or new migrations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Domain Password value object enforcing 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: AUTH-001 password policy implemented as a domain value object.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: AppErrorBoundary accepts a translated fallback; DefaultErrorFallback uses i18n common keys.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: No hardcoded text in fallback UI; boundary is composed in RootProviders.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Added optional phone field to ProfileDto in packages/types.
deviations_from_plan.justification: Profile completion screen requires phone capture; minimal additive contract change.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Added Password value object to packages/domain.
deviations_from_plan.justification: Domain layer is the correct place for AUTH-001 password policy; no existing value object covered it.
Turbo cache is a local build artifact and should not be committed.

validation_results.note: Supabase Auth integration was not validated against a live project in this expedition; it depends on EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY at runtime.

exclusions: No booking lifecycle (E7, gated by R1).
No backend seed data or migrations beyond E4.
No changes to knowledge/ authored artifacts.
No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record and governance-0014.
No git commits, branches, or pushes performed.
